name: LITHIA MOTORS INC
summary: PART I As used in this Annual Report, the terms Lithia, Lithia and Driveway, LAD, the Company, we, us, and our refer collectively to Lithia Motors, Inc. and its subsidiaries, unless otherwise required by the context. Our store operations are conducted by our subsidiaries.
